frame_label: 'Not All Men' Dismissal & Why Women Fear
generated_comment: Arre, I understand women have concerns, but every man should not be looked at like a criminal. Main toh kabhi aisa kuch kiya nahi, yet nowadays even basic politeness gets treated with suspicion. Fairness dono side honi chahiye, na.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's fear by centering the speaker's own innocence and hurt feelings rather than the structural reasons for women's caution. It encodes the classic 'not all men' response and frames women's wariness as unfair treatment of good men.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 48. Married. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are having dinner with your wife after your close friend called earlier today to say his wife just found out he has been having an affair with a woman from his gym for eight months. Your wife is upset about it. You are telling her your take on the situation and specifically what role you think the woman from the gym played and why you think women like her deliberately target married men.
